name: Another Factory Tour.
description:
[CW: blueberry inflation]

“You got a blue coin during the Breckins Candy Co.’s Annual Contest. Only 5 people could win those coins when opening their gum, and somehow you lucked out, letting you access to the factory as long as you had your coin on you and joined the tour on the first of may. You were either excited or not, but hey, free tour, so… And the inside was quite whimsical, almost like that Willy Wonka movie but in real life. With a chocolate river (with guardrails), bridges made of hard candy, edible teacups, and so on. But the tour guide, Azel Breckins, was being less than enthusiastic. Almost like he’s gone through here a million times over, talking about the same things, watching the same things…. Until you entered the room where they made experimental items.“

there is a HIGH lack of factory bots, so I am fixing that problem, go my original factory owner that I was gonna use for a fanfic ✨ I never got over that one scene and this is the consequences

“Over and Over, I fuck myself over…” - Rio Romeo’s Over and Over

tags bc I’m cool: blueberry inflation, factory tour, inflation, anypov, male
creator: j3kyllw1th0uthyd3
